Class GemFireVectorStore.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<GemFireVectorStore.Builder>
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.gemfire.GemFireVectorStore.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
VectorStore.Builder<GemFireVectorStore.Builder>
Enclosing class:
GemFireVectorStore
public static class GemFireVectorStore.Builder extends AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<GemFireVectorStore.Builder>
Builder class for creating GemFireVectorStore instances.

Provides a fluent API for configuring all aspects of the GemFire vector store.

Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Geet Rawat, Christian Tzolov, Thomas Vitale, Soby Chacko, Sebastien Deleuze, chabinhwang

  • Method Details

    • host

      public GemFireVectorStore.Builder host(String host)
      Sets the host for the GemFire connection.
      Parameters:
      host - the host to connect to
      Returns:
      the builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if host is null or empty

    • port

      public GemFireVectorStore.Builder port(int port)
      Sets the port for the GemFire connection.
      Parameters:
      port - the port to connect to
      Returns:
      the builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if port is not positive

    • sslEnabled

      public GemFireVectorStore.Builder sslEnabled(boolean sslEnabled)
      Sets whether SSL is enabled for the connection.
      Parameters:
      sslEnabled - true to enable SSL, false otherwise
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • indexName

      public GemFireVectorStore.Builder indexName(String indexName)
      Sets the index name.
      Parameters:
      indexName - the name of the index
      Returns:
      the builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if indexName is null or empty

    • beamWidth

      public GemFireVectorStore.Builder beamWidth(int beamWidth)
      Sets the beam width.
      Parameters:
      beamWidth - the beam width value
      Returns:
      the builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if beamWidth is not within valid range

    • maxConnections

      public GemFireVectorStore.Builder maxConnections(int maxConnections)
      Sets the maximum number of connections.
      Parameters:
      maxConnections - the maximum connections value
      Returns:
      the builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if maxConnections is not within valid range

    • buckets

      public GemFireVectorStore.Builder buckets(int buckets)
      Sets the number of buckets.
      Parameters:
      buckets - the number of buckets
      Returns:
      the builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if buckets is negative

    • vectorSimilarityFunction

      public GemFireVectorStore.Builder vectorSimilarityFunction(String vectorSimilarityFunction)
      Sets the vector similarity function.
      Parameters:
      vectorSimilarityFunction - the similarity function to use
      Returns:
      the builder instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if vectorSimilarityFunction is null or empty

    • fields

      public GemFireVectorStore.Builder fields(String[] fields)
      Sets the fields array.
      Parameters:
      fields - the fields to use
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • initializeSchema

      public GemFireVectorStore.Builder initializeSchema(boolean initializeSchema)
      Sets whether to initialize the schema.
      Parameters:
      initializeSchema - true to initialize schema, false otherwise
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • username

      public GemFireVectorStore.Builder username(String username)
      Sets the username to authenticate requests with
      Parameters:
      username - the username to authenticate or unauthenticated if not set
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • password

      public GemFireVectorStore.Builder password(String password)
      Sets the password to authenticate requests with
      Parameters:
      password - the password to authenticate if username is also provided
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • token

      public GemFireVectorStore.Builder token(String token)
      Sets the token to authenticate requests with
      Parameters:
      token - the token to use for authentication
      Returns:
      the builder instance

    • isUsingTokenAuthentication

      public boolean isUsingTokenAuthentication()
      Returns:
      true if a token has been provided

    • isUsingBasicAuthentication

      public boolean isUsingBasicAuthentication()
      Returns:
      true if a username and password have been provided

    • build

      public GemFireVectorStore build()
      Description copied from interface: VectorStore.Builder
      Builds and returns a new VectorStore instance with the configured settings.
